prompt: A surreal, minimalist architectural diptych. Left panel: A close-up of a marble staircase ascending sharply into bright light. Right panel: A wide-angle view of dozens of identical small staircases floating in a void; while every individual staircase clearly angles upward, they are stepped downward in a massive, staggered formation, creating a global pathway that leads into a dark, foggy abyss. No text, no numbers, no people. Impossible Euclidean geometry, Escher-style lighting, high contrast, uncanny atmosphere. 8k resolution.
tradition_approach: Minimalist composition with impossible geometry and high-contrast lighting
